title: Vellum-covered boards — paring and lacing vellum
sources: Douglas Cockerell, Bookbinding and the Care of Books (1901) — chapter on covering in vellum, including paring and lacing methods
notes: Covers paring to a consistent thinness at the turn-in, dampening, lacing through the board holes, and the properties of dry-shrink tension in vellum as a final tightening mechanism.
